## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Project-state update

- [ ] I read `project-state.md` before implementation.
- [ ] I updated `project-state.md` for all implemented, removed, deployed, deferred, or newly discovered work.
- [ ] I added a change-log row.
- [ ] I clearly distinguished planned work from implemented, merged, and deployed work.
- [ ] I documented any new dependency, environment variable, integration, privacy, security, cost, or open-decision impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Relevant tests and smoke checks
- [ ] Responsive and keyboard review when UI changed
- [ ] Secret, private-data, and unsupported-claims review

List skipped or unavailable checks and explain why.

## Deferred work and open decisions

List anything intentionally left for a later milestone or requiring confirmation from John and Natalee.
